title: Add explicit encoding='utf-8' to file open calls
description: Several file open calls were missing the encoding parameter, which defaults to the system locale on Windows. Added explicit UTF-8 encoding to prevent mojibake on non-UTF-8 systems.
diff:
diff --git a/utils/file_io.py b/utils/file_io.py
index 4d5e6f7..a8b9c0d 100644
--- a/utils/file_io.py
+++ b/utils/file_io.py
@@ -8,12 +8,12 @@ from typing import Any
 
 def read_json(path: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
     '''Read and parse a JSON file.'''
-    with open(path, "r") as f:
+    with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
         return json.load(f)
 
 
 def write_json(path: str, data: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
     '''Write data as formatted JSON.'''
-    with open(path, "w") as f:
+    with open(path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
         json.dump(data, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
author: gus
